closed_out_of_scope_records.blocker: Working OPH hadron backend on suitable hardware such as GLORB/Echosahedron.
closed_out_of_scope_records.chrome_policy: Do not use Chrome workers for backend execution.
closed_out_of_scope_records.closure: Production backend output and continuum/volume/chiral/statistical systematics are published.
closed_out_of_scope_records.closure_note: Closed as out-of-scope, not solved. The current pipeline emits no hadron predictions until a working OPH hadron backend on suitable hardware publishes production output and systematics.
closed_out_of_scope_records.falsification: Surrogate local hadron artifacts are required as if they were production QCD outputs.
closed_out_of_scope_records.title: hadron backend/systematics

closed_out_of_scope_records.chrome_policy: Do not use Chrome workers for backend execution.
closed_out_of_scope_records.closure: Compact paper states the backend output and budgets or marks hadrons out-of-scope.
closed_out_of_scope_records.closure_note: Closed as out-of-scope, not solved. Compact-paper hadron claims remain suppressed until a working OPH backend emits the required nonperturbative QCD/hadron data.
closed_out_of_scope_records.falsification: Compact paper promotes hadron masses without production backend evidence.
closed_out_of_scope_records.title: nonperturbative QCD hadron branch
